changes.title: OpenAI Codex/模型: normalize stale native transport metadata 在 both runtime resolution 和 discovery/listing so legacy `OpenAI-Codex` rows 使用 missing `API` 或 `https://chatgpt.com/backend-API/v1` self-heal to the canonical Codex transport 而不是 routing requests through broken HTML/Cloudflare paths, combining the original 修复 proposed 在 #66969 (saamuelng601-pixel) 和 #67159 (hclsys). (#67635)
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI Codex/models: normalize stale native transport metadata in both runtime resolution and discovery/listing so legacy `openai-codex` rows with missing `api` or `https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/v1` self-heal to the canonical Codex transport instead of routing requests through broken HTML/Cloudflare paths, combining the original fixes proposed in #66969 (saamuelng601-pixel) and #67159 (hclsys). (#67635)

changes.title: Agent/failover: treat HTML provider 错误 pages as upstream transport failures 为了 CDN-style 5xx responses 不适用 misclassifying embedded body text as API rate limits, while still preserving 认证 remediation 为了 HTML 401/403 pages 和 代理 remediation 为了 HTML 407 pages. (#67642) Thanks @stainlu.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: treat HTML provider error pages as upstream transport failures for CDN-style 5xx responses without misclassifying embedded body text as API rate limits, while still preserving auth remediation for HTML 401/403 pages and proxy remediation for HTML 407 pages. (#67642) Thanks @stainlu.

changes.title: 网关/skills: bump the cached skills-snapshot version whenever a 配置 write touches `skills.*` (为了 example `skills.allowBundled`, `skills.entries.<id>.enabled`, 或 `skills.profile`). Existing Agent sessions persist a `skillsSnapshot` 在 `sessions.json` that reuses the skill list frozen at session creation; 不适用 this invalidation, removing a bundled skill 从 the allowlist left the old snapshot live 和 the 模型 kept calling the disabled 工具, producing `工具 <name> not found` loops that ran until the embedded-run 超时. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/skills: bump the cached skills-snapshot version whenever a config write touches `skills.*` (for example `skills.allowBundled`, `skills.entries.<id>.enabled`, or `skills.profile`). Existing agent sessions persist a `skillsSnapshot` in `sessions.json` that reuses the skill list frozen at session creation; without this invalidation, removing a bundled skill from the allowlist left the old snapshot live and the model kept calling the disabled tool, producing `Tool <name> not found` loops that ran until the embedded-run timeout. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

changes.title: Agent/工具-loop: 启用 the unknown-工具 stream guard 通过 default. Previously `resolveUnknownToolGuardThreshold` returned `undefined` unless `tools.loopDetection.enabled` was explicitly set to `true`, which left the protection off 在 the default configuration. A hallucinated 或 removed 工具 (为了 example `himalaya` 之后 it was dropped 从 `skills.allowBundled`) would then loop "工具 X not found" attempts until the full embedded-run 超时. The guard has no false-positive surface because it only triggers 在 tools that are objectively not registered 在 the run, so it 现在 stays 在 regardless 的 `tools.loopDetection.enabled` 和 still accepts `tools.loopDetection.unknownToolThreshold` as a per-run override (default 10). (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tool-loop: enable the unknown-tool stream guard by default. Previously `resolveUnknownToolGuardThreshold` returned `undefined` unless `tools.loopDetection.enabled` was explicitly set to `true`, which left the protection off in the default configuration. A hallucinated or removed tool (for example `himalaya` after it was dropped from `skills.allowBundled`) would then loop "Tool X not found" attempts until the full embedded-run timeout. The guard has no false-positive surface because it only triggers on tools that are objectively not registered in the run, so it now stays on regardless of `tools.loopDetection.enabled` and still accepts `tools.loopDetection.unknownToolThreshold` as a per-run override (default 10). (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

changes.title: TUI/streaming: 添加 a client-side streaming watchdog to `tui-event-handlers` so the `streaming · Xm Ys` activity indicator resets to `idle` 之后 30s 的 delta silence 在 the active run. Guards against lost 或 late `state: "final"` chat events (WS reconnects, 网关 restarts, etc.) leaving the TUI stuck 在 `streaming` indefinitely; a new system log line surfaces the reset so users know to send a new message to resync. The window is configurable via the new `streamingWatchdogMs` context 选项 (set to `0` to 禁用), 和 the handler 现在 exposes a `dispose()` that clears the pending timer 在 shutdown. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
changes.rawTitle: TUI/streaming: add a client-side streaming watchdog to `tui-event-handlers` so the `streaming · Xm Ys` activity indicator resets to `idle` after 30s of delta silence on the active run. Guards against lost or late `state: "final"` chat events (WS reconnects, gateway restarts, etc.) leaving the TUI stuck on `streaming` indefinitely; a new system log line surfaces the reset so users know to send a new message to resync. The window is configurable via the new `streamingWatchdogMs` context option (set to `0` to disable), and the handler now exposes a `dispose()` that clears the pending timer on shutdown. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

changes.title: Extensions/lmstudio: 添加 exponential backoff to the inference-preload wrapper so an LM Studio 模型-load failure (为了 example the built-在 内存 guardrail rejecting a load because the swap is saturated) no longer produces a WARN line every ~2s 为了 every chat request. The wrapper 现在 records consecutive preload failures per `(baseUrl, modelKey, contextLength)` tuple 使用 a 5s → 10s → 20s → … → 5min cooldown 和 skips the preload step entirely while a cooldown is active, letting chat requests proceed directly to the stream (the 模型 is often already loaded via the LM Studio 界面). The combined `preload failed` log line 现在 reports consecutive-failure count 和 remaining cooldown so operators can act 在 the real issue 而不是 drowning 在 repeated warnings. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
changes.rawTitle: Extensions/lmstudio: add exponential backoff to the inference-preload wrapper so an LM Studio model-load failure (for example the built-in memory guardrail rejecting a load because the swap is saturated) no longer produces a WARN line every ~2s for every chat request. The wrapper now records consecutive preload failures per `(baseUrl, modelKey, contextLength)` tuple with a 5s → 10s → 20s → … → 5min cooldown and skips the preload step entirely while a cooldown is active, letting chat requests proceed directly to the stream (the model is often already loaded via the LM Studio UI). The combined `preload failed` log line now reports consecutive-failure count and remaining cooldown so operators can act on the real issue instead of drowning in repeated warnings. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

changes.title: Agent/replay: re-run 工具/result pairing 之后 strict replay 工具-call ID sanitization 在 outbound requests so Anthropic-compatible providers like MiniMax no longer receive malformed orphan 工具-result IDs such as `...toolresult1` 期间 compaction 和 重试 flows. (#67620) Thanks @stainlu.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/replay: re-run tool/result pairing after strict replay tool-call ID sanitization on outbound requests so Anthropic-compatible providers like MiniMax no longer receive malformed orphan tool-result IDs such as `...toolresult1` during compaction and retry flows. (#67620) Thanks @stainlu.

changes.title: 网关/startup: 修复 spurious SIGUSR1 restart loop 在 Linux/systemd 当 插件 auto-启用 is the only startup 配置 write; the 配置 hash guard was not captured 为了 that write 路径, causing chokidar to treat each boot write as an external 更改 和 trigger a reload → restart cycle that corrupts manifest.db 之后 repeated cycles. 修复 #67436. (#67557) thanks @openperf
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: fix spurious SIGUSR1 restart loop on Linux/systemd when plugin auto-enable is the only startup config write; the config hash guard was not captured for that write path, causing chokidar to treat each boot write as an external change and trigger a reload → restart cycle that corrupts manifest.db after repeated cycles. Fixes #67436. (#67557) thanks @openperf

changes.rawTitle: Cron/announce delivery: keep isolated announce `NO_REPLY` stripping case-insensitive across direct and text delivery, preserve structured media-only sends when a caption strips silent, and derive main-session awareness from the cleaned payloads so silent captions no longer leak stale `NO_REPLY` text. changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/prompt-cache: keep volatile inbound chat IDs out of the stable system prompt so task-scoped adapters can reuse prompt caches across runs, while preserving conversation metadata for the user turn and media-only messages. (#65071) Thanks @MonkeyLeeT.

changes.title: BlueBubbles/inbound: restore inbound image attachment downloads 在 Node 22+ 通过 stripping incompatible bundled-undici dispatchers 从 the non-SSRF fetch 路径, accept `已更新-message` webhooks carrying attachments, use event-type-aware dedup keys so attachment follow-ups are not rejected as duplicates, 和 重试 attachment fetch 从 the BB API 当 the initial Webhook arrives 使用 an empty array. (#64105, #61861, #65430, #67510) Thanks @omarshahine.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/inbound: restore inbound image attachment downloads on Node 22+ by stripping incompatible bundled-undici dispatchers from the non-SSRF fetch path, accept `updated-message` webhooks carrying attachments, use event-type-aware dedup keys so attachment follow-ups are not rejected as duplicates, and retry attachment fetch from the BB API when the initial webhook arrives with an empty array. (#64105, #61861, #65430, #67510) Thanks @omarshahine.

changes.rawTitle: Memory-core/QMD `memory_get`: reject reads of arbitrary workspace markdown paths and only allow canonical memory files (`MEMORY.md`, `memory.md`, `DREAMS.md`, `dreams.md`, `memory/**`) plus exact paths of active indexed QMD workspace documents, so the QMD memory backend can no longer be used as a generic workspace-file read shim that bypasses `read` tool-policy denials. changes.title: 网关/认证: 解决 the active 网关 bearer per-request 在 the HTTP server 和 the HTTP upgrade handler via `getResolvedAuth()`, mirroring the WebSocket 路径, so a secret rotated through `secrets.reload` 或 配置 hot-reload stops authenticating 在 `/v1/*`, `/tools/invoke`, 插件 HTTP routes, 和 the canvas upgrade 路径 immediately 而不是 remaining valid 在 HTTP until 网关 restart. changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: resolve the active gateway bearer per-request on the HTTP server and the HTTP upgrade handler via `getResolvedAuth()`, mirroring the WebSocket path, so a secret rotated through `secrets.reload` or config hot-reload stops authenticating on `/v1/*`, `/tools/invoke`, plugin HTTP routes, and the canvas upgrade path immediately instead of remaining valid on HTTP until gateway restart. (#66651) Thanks @mmaps.

changes.title: Slack/native commands: 修复 选项 menus 为了 slash commands such as `/verbose` 当 Slack renders native buttons 通过 giving each button a unique action ID while still routing them through the shared `openclaw_cmdarg*` listener. Thanks @Wangmerlyn.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/native commands: fix option menus for slash commands such as `/verbose` when Slack renders native buttons by giving each button a unique action ID while still routing them through the shared `openclaw_cmdarg*` listener. Thanks @Wangmerlyn.

changes.title: 飞书/Webhook: harden the Webhook transport 和 card-action replay guards to fail closed 在 missing `encryptKey` 和 blank callback tokens — refuse to start the Webhook transport 不适用 an `encryptKey`, reject unsigned requests 当 no 密钥 is present 而不是 accepting them, 和 drop blank card-action tokens 之前 the dedupe claim 和 dispatcher. Defense-在-depth over the already-closed monitor-account layer. (#66707) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/webhook: harden the webhook transport and card-action replay guards to fail closed on missing `encryptKey` and blank callback tokens — refuse to start the webhook transport without an `encryptKey`, reject unsigned requests when no key is present instead of accepting them, and drop blank card-action tokens before the dedupe claim and dispatcher. Defense-in-depth over the already-closed monitor-account layer. (#66707) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Agent/workspace files: route `Agent.files.get`, `Agent.files.set`, 和 workspace listing through the shared `fs-safe` helpers (`openFileWithinRoot`/`readFileWithinRoot`/`writeFileWithinRoot`), reject symlink aliases 为了 allowlisted Agent files, 和 have `fs-safe` 解决 opened-file real paths 从 the file descriptor 之前 falling back to 路径-based `realpath` so a symlink swap 之间 `open` 和 `realpath` can no longer redirect the validated 路径 off the intended inode. (#66636) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/workspace files: route `agents.files.get`, `agents.files.set`, and workspace listing through the shared `fs-safe` helpers (`openFileWithinRoot`/`readFileWithinRoot`/`writeFileWithinRoot`), reject symlink aliases for allowlisted agent files, and have `fs-safe` resolve opened-file real paths from the file descriptor before falling back to path-based `realpath` so a symlink swap between `open` and `realpath` can no longer redirect the validated path off the intended inode. (#66636) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 网关/MCP协议 loopback: switch the `/MCP协议` bearer comparison 从 plain `!==` to constant-time `safeEqualSecret` (matching the convention every other 认证 surface 在 the codebase uses), 和 reject non-loopback 浏览器-origin requests via `checkBrowserOrigin` 之前 the 认证 gate runs. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. (#66665) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/MCP loopback: switch the `/mcp` bearer comparison from plain `!==` to constant-time `safeEqualSecret` (matching the convention every other auth surface in the codebase uses), and reject non-loopback browser-origin requests via `checkBrowserOrigin` before the auth gate runs. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. (#66665) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Auto-reply/billing: classify pure billing cooldown fallback summaries 从 structured fallback reasons so users see billing guidance 而不是 the generic failure reply. (#66363) Thanks @Rohan5commit.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/billing: classify pure billing cooldown fallback summaries from structured fallback reasons so users see billing guidance instead of the generic failure reply. (#66363) Thanks @Rohan5commit.

changes.title: Agent/fallback: 保留 the original prompt body 在 模型 fallback retries 使用 session history so the retrying 模型 keeps the active task 而不是 only seeing a generic continue message. (#66029) Thanks @WuKongAI-CMU.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/fallback: preserve the original prompt body on model fallback retries with session history so the retrying model keeps the active task instead of only seeing a generic continue message. (#66029) Thanks @WuKongAI-CMU.

changes.title: Reply/secrets: 解决 active reply channel/account SecretRefs 之前 reply-run message-action discovery so channel 令牌 SecretRefs (为了 example Discord) do not degrade 进入 discovery-time unresolved-secret failures. (#66796) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Reply/secrets: resolve active reply channel/account SecretRefs before reply-run message-action discovery so channel token SecretRefs (for example Discord) do not degrade into discovery-time unresolved-secret failures. (#66796) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Agent/Anthropic: ignore non-positive Anthropic Messages 令牌 overrides 和 fail locally 当 no positive 令牌 budget remains, so invalid `max_tokens` values no longer reach the provider API. (#66664) thanks @jalehman
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Anthropic: ignore non-positive Anthropic Messages token overrides and fail locally when no positive token budget remains, so invalid `max_tokens` values no longer reach the provider API. (#66664) thanks @jalehman

changes.title: Agent/context engines: 保留 prompt-only 令牌 counts, not full request totals, 当 deferred maintenance reuses 之后-turn runtime context so background compaction bookkeeping matches the active prompt window. (#66820) thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/context engines: preserve prompt-only token counts, not full request totals, when deferred maintenance reuses after-turn runtime context so background compaction bookkeeping matches the active prompt window. (#66820) thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: BlueBubbles/inbound: 添加 a persistent file-backed GUID dedupe so MessagePoller Webhook replays 之后 BB Server restart 或 reconnect no longer cause the Agent to re-reply to already-handled messages. (#19176, #12053, #66816) Thanks @omarshahine.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/inbound: add a persistent file-backed GUID dedupe so MessagePoller webhook replays after BB Server restart or reconnect no longer cause the agent to re-reply to already-handled messages. (#19176, #12053, #66816) Thanks @omarshahine.

changes.title: Secrets/插件/status: align SecretRef inspect-vs-strict handling across 插件 preload, read-only status/Agent surfaces, 和 runtime 认证 paths so unresolved refs no longer 崩溃 read-only CLI flows while runtime-required non-env refs stay strict. (#66818) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Secrets/plugins/status: align SecretRef inspect-vs-strict handling across plugin preload, read-only status/agents surfaces, and runtime auth paths so unresolved refs no longer crash read-only CLI flows while runtime-required non-env refs stay strict. (#66818) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: 内存/dreaming: 停止 ordinary transcripts that merely quote the dream-diary prompt 从 being classified as internal dreaming runs 和 静默地 dropped 从 session recall ingestion. (#66852) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: stop ordinary transcripts that merely quote the dream-diary prompt from being classified as internal dreaming runs and silently dropped from session recall ingestion. (#66852) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Telegram/documents: sanitize binary reply context 和 ZIP-like archive extraction so `.epub` 和 `.mobi` uploads can no longer leak raw binary 进入 prompt context through reply metadata 或 archive-to-`text/plain` coercion. (#66877) Thanks @martinfrancois.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/documents: sanitize binary reply context and ZIP-like archive extraction so `.epub` and `.mobi` uploads can no longer leak raw binary into prompt context through reply metadata or archive-to-`text/plain` coercion. (#66877) Thanks @martinfrancois.

changes.title: Telegram/native commands: restore 插件-registry-backed auto defaults 为了 native commands 和 native skills so Telegram slash commands keep registering 当 `commands.native` 和 `commands.nativeSkills` stay 在 `auto`. (#66843) Thanks @kashevk0.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/native commands: restore plugin-registry-backed auto defaults for native commands and native skills so Telegram slash commands keep registering when `commands.native` and `commands.nativeSkills` stay on `auto`. (#66843) Thanks @kashevk0.

changes.title: OpenRouter/Qwen3: parse `reasoning_details` stream deltas as thinking content 不适用 skipping same-chunk 工具 calls, so Qwen3 replies no longer fail empty 在 OpenRouter 和 mixed reasoning/工具-call chunks still execute normally. (#66905) Thanks @bladin.
changes.rawTitle: OpenRouter/Qwen3: parse `reasoning_details` stream deltas as thinking content without skipping same-chunk tool calls, so Qwen3 replies no longer fail empty on OpenRouter and mixed reasoning/tool-call chunks still execute normally. (#66905) Thanks @bladin.

changes.title: BlueBubbles/catchup: replay missed Webhook messages 之后 网关 restart via a persistent per-account cursor 和 `/API/v1/message/query?之后=<ts>` pass, so messages delivered while the 网关 was down no longer disappear. Uses the existing `processMessage` 路径 和 is deduped 通过 #66816's inbound GUID cache. (#66857, #66721) Thanks @omarshahine.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/catchup: replay missed webhook messages after gateway restart via a persistent per-account cursor and `/api/v1/message/query?after=<ts>` pass, so messages delivered while the gateway was down no longer disappear. Uses the existing `processMessage` path and is deduped by #66816's inbound GUID cache. (#66857, #66721) Thanks @omarshahine.

changes.title: Telegram/native commands: keep Telegram 命令-sync cache process-local so 网关 restarts re-register the menu 而不是 trusting stale 在-disk sync state 之后 Telegram cleared commands out-的-band. (#66730) Thanks @nightq.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/native commands: keep Telegram command-sync cache process-local so gateway restarts re-register the menu instead of trusting stale on-disk sync state after Telegram cleared commands out-of-band. (#66730) Thanks @nightq.

changes.rawTitle: Audio/self-hosted STT: restore `models.providers.*.request.allowPrivateNetwork` for audio transcription so private or LAN speech-to-text endpoints stop tripping SSRF blocks after the v2026.4.14 regression. (#66692) Thanks @jhsmith409.

changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/media: allow workspace-rooted absolute media paths in auto-reply send flows so valid local media references no longer fail path validation. (#66689)

changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/Baileys media upload: harden encrypted upload handling so large outbound media sends avoid buffer spikes and reliability regressions. (#65966) Thanks @frankekn.

changes.title: QQBot/cron: guard against undefined `event.content` 在 `parseFaceTags` 和 `filterInternalMarkers` so cron-triggered Agent turns 使用 no content payload no longer 崩溃 使用 `TypeError: Cannot read properties 的 undefined (reading 'startsWith')`. (#66302) Thanks @xinmotlanthua.

changes.title: CLI/插件: 停止 `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` 插件 installs 从 falling back to hook-pack installs 之后 安全 scan failures, while still preserving non-安全 fallback behavior 为了 real hook packs. (#58909) Thanks @hxy91819.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: stop `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` plugin installs from falling back to hook-pack installs after security scan failures, while still preserving non-security fallback behavior for real hook packs. (#58909) Thanks @hxy91819.

changes.title: Claude CLI/sessions: classify `No conversation found 使用 session ID` as `session_expired` so expired CLI-backed conversations clear the stale binding 和 recover 在 the next turn. (#65028) thanks @Ivan-Fn.
changes.rawTitle: Claude CLI/sessions: classify `No conversation found with session ID` as `session_expired` so expired CLI-backed conversations clear the stale binding and recover on the next turn. (#65028) thanks @Ivan-Fn.

changes.title: Context Engine: gracefully fall back to the legacy engine 当 a third-party context engine 插件 fails at resolution time (unregistered id, factory throw, 或 contract violation), preventing a full 网关 outage 在 every channel. (#66930) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Context Engine: gracefully fall back to the legacy engine when a third-party context engine plugin fails at resolution time (unregistered id, factory throw, or contract violation), preventing a full gateway outage on every channel. (#66930) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: Control 界面/chat: keep optimistic user message cards visible 期间 active sends 通过 deferring same-session history reloads until the active run ends, including aborted 和 errored runs. (#66997) Thanks @scotthuang 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: keep optimistic user message cards visible during active sends by deferring same-session history reloads until the active run ends, including aborted and errored runs. (#66997) Thanks @scotthuang and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Media/Slack: 允许 host-local CSV 和 Markdown uploads only 当 the fallback buffer actually decodes as text, so real plain-text files work 不适用 letting opaque non-text blobs renamed to `.csv` 或 `.md` slip past the host-read guard. (#67047) Thanks @Unayung.
changes.rawTitle: Media/Slack: allow host-local CSV and Markdown uploads only when the fallback buffer actually decodes as text, so real plain-text files work without letting opaque non-text blobs renamed to `.csv` or `.md` slip past the host-read guard. (#67047) Thanks @Unayung.

changes.title: Ollama/onboarding: split setup 进入 `Cloud + Local`, `Cloud only`, 和 `Local only`, 支持 direct `OLLAMA_API_KEY` cloud setup 不适用 a local daemon, 和 keep Ollama web search 在 the local-host 路径. (#67005) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Dreaming/内存-core: use the ingestion day, not the source file day, 为了 daily recall dedupe so repeat sweeps 的 the same daily note can increment `dailyCount` across days 而不是 stalling at `1`. (#67091) Thanks @Bartok9.
changes.rawTitle: Dreaming/memory-core: use the ingestion day, not the source file day, for daily recall dedupe so repeat sweeps of the same daily note can increment `dailyCount` across days instead of stalling at `1`. (#67091) Thanks @Bartok9.

changes.title: Node-host/tools.exec: let approval binding distinguish known native binaries 从 mutable shell payload files, while still fail-closing unknown 或 racy file probes so absolute-路径 node-host commands like `/usr/bin/whoami` no longer get rejected as unsafe interpreter/runtime commands. (#66731) Thanks @tmimmanuel.
changes.rawTitle: Node-host/tools.exec: let approval binding distinguish known native binaries from mutable shell payload files, while still fail-closing unknown or racy file probes so absolute-path node-host commands like `/usr/bin/whoami` no longer get rejected as unsafe interpreter/runtime commands. items.title: OpenAI Codex/模型: normalize stale native transport metadata 在 both runtime resolution 和 discovery/listing so legacy `OpenAI-Codex` rows 使用 missing `API` 或 `https://chatgpt.com/backend-API/v1` self-heal to the canonical Codex transport 而不是 routing requests through broken HTML/Cloudflare paths, combining the original 修复 proposed 在 #66969 (saamuelng601-pixel) 和 #67159 (hclsys). (#67635)
items.rawTitle: OpenAI Codex/models: normalize stale native transport metadata in both runtime resolution and discovery/listing so legacy `openai-codex` rows with missing `api` or `https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/v1` self-heal to the canonical Codex transport instead of routing requests through broken HTML/Cloudflare paths, combining the original fixes proposed in #66969 (saamuelng601-pixel) and #67159 (hclsys). (#67635)

items.title: Extensions/lmstudio: 添加 exponential backoff to the inference-preload wrapper so an LM Studio 模型-load failure (为了 example the built-在 内存 guardrail rejecting a load because the swap is saturated) no longer produces a WARN line every ~2s 为了 every chat request. The wrapper 现在 records consecutive preload failures per `(baseUrl, modelKey, contextLength)` tuple 使用 a 5s → 10s → 20s → … → 5min cooldown 和 skips the preload step entirely while a cooldown is active, letting chat requests proceed directly to the stream (the 模型 is often already loaded via the LM Studio 界面). The combined `preload failed` log line 现在 reports consecutive-failure count 和 remaining cooldown so operators can act 在 the real issue 而不是 drowning 在 repeated warnings. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
items.rawTitle: Extensions/lmstudio: add exponential backoff to the inference-preload wrapper so an LM Studio model-load failure (for example the built-in memory guardrail rejecting a load because the swap is saturated) no longer produces a WARN line every ~2s for every chat request. The wrapper now records consecutive preload failures per `(baseUrl, modelKey, contextLength)` tuple with a 5s → 10s → 20s → … → 5min cooldown and skips the preload step entirely while a cooldown is active, letting chat requests proceed directly to the stream (the model is often already loaded via the LM Studio UI). The combined `preload failed` log line now reports consecutive-failure count and remaining cooldown so operators can act on the real issue instead of drowning in repeated warnings. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

items.title: Agent/replay: re-run 工具/result pairing 之后 strict replay 工具-call ID sanitization 在 outbound requests so Anthropic-compatible providers like MiniMax no longer receive malformed orphan 工具-result IDs such as `...toolresult1` 期间 compaction 和 重试 flows. (#67620) Thanks @stainlu.
items.rawTitle: Agents/replay: re-run tool/result pairing after strict replay tool-call ID sanitization on outbound requests so Anthropic-compatible providers like MiniMax no longer receive malformed orphan tool-result IDs such as `...toolresult1` during compaction and retry flows. (#67620) Thanks @stainlu.

items.title: Codex/app-server: parse Desktop-originated app-server user Agent such as `Codex Desktop/0.118.0`, keeping the version gate working 当 the Codex CLI inherits a multi-word originator. (#64666) Thanks @cyrusaf.
items.rawTitle: Codex/app-server: parse Desktop-originated app-server user agents such as `Codex Desktop/0.118.0`, keeping the version gate working when the Codex CLI inherits a multi-word originator. (#64666) Thanks @cyrusaf.

items.rawTitle: Models/probe: surface invalid-model probe failures as `format` instead of `unknown` in `models list --probe`, and lock the invalid-model fallback path in with regression coverage. (#50028) Thanks @xiwuqi.

items.title: Packaging/插件: localize bundled 插件 runtime deps to their owning extensions, trim the published docs payload, 和 tighten install/package-manager guardrails so published builds stay leaner 和 core stops carrying extension-owned runtime baggage. (#67099) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Packaging/plugins: localize bundled plugin runtime deps to their owning extensions, trim the published docs payload, and tighten install/package-manager guardrails so published builds stay leaner and core stops carrying extension-owned runtime baggage. (#67099) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Dreaming/内存-core: 更改 the default `dreaming.storage.mode` 从 `inline` to `separate` so Dreaming phase blocks (`## Light Sleep`, `## REM Sleep`) land 在 `内存/dreaming/{phase}/YYYY-MM-DD.md` 而不是 being injected 进入 `内存/YYYY-MM-DD.md`. Daily 内存 files no longer get dominated 通过 structured candidate output, 和 the daily-ingestion scanner that already strips dream marker blocks no longer has to compete 使用 hundreds 的 phase-block lines 在 every run. Operators who want the previous behavior can opt 在 通过 设置 `插件.entries.内存-core.配置.dreaming.storage.mode: "inline"`. (#66412) Thanks @mjamiv.
items.rawTitle: Dreaming/memory-core: change the default `dreaming.storage.mode` from `inline` to `separate` so Dreaming phase blocks (`## Light Sleep`, `## REM Sleep`) land in `memory/dreaming/{phase}/YYYY-MM-DD.md` instead of being injected into `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`. Daily memory files no longer get dominated by structured candidate output, and the daily-ingestion scanner that already strips dream marker blocks no longer has to compete with hundreds of phase-block lines on every run. Operators who want the previous behavior can opt in by setting `plugins.entries.memory-core.config.dreaming.storage.mode: "inline"`. (#66412) Thanks @mjamiv.

items.title: 网关/startup: 修复 spurious SIGUSR1 restart loop 在 Linux/systemd 当 插件 auto-启用 is the only startup 配置 write; the 配置 hash guard was not captured 为了 that write 路径, causing chokidar to treat each boot write as an external 更改 和 trigger a reload → restart cycle that corrupts manifest.db 之后 repeated cycles. 修复 #67436. (#67557) thanks @openperf
items.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: fix spurious SIGUSR1 restart loop on Linux/systemd when plugin auto-enable is the only startup config write; the config hash guard was not captured for that write path, causing chokidar to treat each boot write as an external change and trigger a reload → restart cycle that corrupts manifest.db after repeated cycles. Fixes #67436. (#67557) thanks @openperf

items.title: 网关/skills: bump the cached skills-snapshot version whenever a 配置 write touches `skills.*` (为了 example `skills.allowBundled`, `skills.entries.<id>.enabled`, 或 `skills.profile`). Existing Agent sessions persist a `skillsSnapshot` 在 `sessions.json` that reuses the skill list frozen at session creation; 不适用 this invalidation, removing a bundled skill 从 the allowlist left the old snapshot live 和 the 模型 kept calling the disabled 工具, producing `工具 <name> not found` loops that ran until the embedded-run 超时. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/skills: bump the cached skills-snapshot version whenever a config write touches `skills.*` (for example `skills.allowBundled`, `skills.entries.<id>.enabled`, or `skills.profile`). Existing agent sessions persist a `skillsSnapshot` in `sessions.json` that reuses the skill list frozen at session creation; without this invalidation, removing a bundled skill from the allowlist left the old snapshot live and the model kept calling the disabled tool, producing `Tool <name> not found` loops that ran until the embedded-run timeout. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

items.title: Agent/工具-loop: 启用 the unknown-工具 stream guard 通过 default. Previously `resolveUnknownToolGuardThreshold` returned `undefined` unless `tools.loopDetection.enabled` was explicitly set to `true`, which left the protection off 在 the default configuration. A hallucinated 或 removed 工具 (为了 example `himalaya` 之后 it was dropped 从 `skills.allowBundled`) would then loop "工具 X not found" attempts until the full embedded-run 超时. The guard has no false-positive surface because it only triggers 在 tools that are objectively not registered 在 the run, so it 现在 stays 在 regardless 的 `tools.loopDetection.enabled` 和 still accepts `tools.loopDetection.unknownToolThreshold` as a per-run override (default 10). (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
items.rawTitle: Agents/tool-loop: enable the unknown-tool stream guard by default. Previously `resolveUnknownToolGuardThreshold` returned `undefined` unless `tools.loopDetection.enabled` was explicitly set to `true`, which left the protection off in the default configuration. A hallucinated or removed tool (for example `himalaya` after it was dropped from `skills.allowBundled`) would then loop "Tool X not found" attempts until the full embedded-run timeout. The guard has no false-positive surface because it only triggers on tools that are objectively not registered in the run, so it now stays on regardless of `tools.loopDetection.enabled` and still accepts `tools.loopDetection.unknownToolThreshold` as a per-run override (default 10). (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

(#67666) Thanks @plgonzalezrx8.

items.title: 网关/MCP协议 loopback: switch the `/MCP协议` bearer comparison 从 plain `!==` to constant-time `safeEqualSecret` (matching the convention every other 认证 surface 在 the codebase uses), 和 reject non-loopback 浏览器-origin requests via `checkBrowserOrigin` 之前 the 认证 gate runs. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. (#66665) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/MCP loopback: switch the `/mcp` bearer comparison from plain `!==` to constant-time `safeEqualSecret` (matching the convention every other auth surface in the codebase uses), and reject non-loopback browser-origin requests via `checkBrowserOrigin` before the auth gate runs. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. (#66665) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.rawTitle: WhatsApp/web-session: drain the pending per-auth creds save queue before reopening sockets so reconnect-time auth bootstrap no longer races in-flight `creds.json` writes and falsely restores from backup. (#67464) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

items.title: BlueBubbles/catchup: 添加 a per-message 重试 ceiling (`catchup.maxFailureRetries`, default 10) so a persistently-failing message 使用 a malformed payload no longer wedges the catchup cursor forever. 之后 N consecutive `processMessage` failures against the same GUID, catchup logs a WARN, skips that message 在 subsequent sweeps, 和 lets the cursor advance past it. Transient failures still 重试 从 the same point as 之前. Also 修复 a lost-更新 race 在 the persistent dedupe file lock that 静默地 dropped inbound GUIDs 在 concurrent writes, a dedupe file naming migration gap 在 version upgrade, 和 a balloon-event bypass that let catchup replay debouncer-coalesced events as standalone messages. (#67426, #66870) Thanks @omarshahine.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/catchup: add a per-message retry ceiling (`catchup.maxFailureRetries`, default 10) so a persistently-failing message with a malformed payload no longer wedges the catchup cursor forever. After N consecutive `processMessage` failures against the same GUID, catchup logs a WARN, skips that message on subsequent sweeps, and lets the cursor advance past it. Transient failures still retry from the same point as before. Also fixes a lost-update race in the persistent dedupe file lock that silently dropped inbound GUIDs on concurrent writes, a dedupe file naming migration gap on version upgrade, and a balloon-event bypass that let catchup replay debouncer-coalesced events as standalone messages. (#67426, #66870) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: TUI/streaming: 添加 a client-side streaming watchdog to `tui-event-handlers` so the `streaming · Xm Ys` activity indicator resets to `idle` 之后 30s 的 delta silence 在 the active run. Guards against lost 或 late `state: "final"` chat events (WS reconnects, 网关 restarts, etc.) leaving the TUI stuck 在 `streaming` indefinitely; a new system log line surfaces the reset so users know to send a new message to resync. The window is configurable via the new `streamingWatchdogMs` context 选项 (set to `0` to 禁用), 和 the handler 现在 exposes a `dispose()` that clears the pending timer 在 shutdown. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
items.rawTitle: TUI/streaming: add a client-side streaming watchdog to `tui-event-handlers` so the `streaming · Xm Ys` activity indicator resets to `idle` after 30s of delta silence on the active run. Guards against lost or late `state: "final"` chat events (WS reconnects, gateway restarts, etc.) leaving the TUI stuck on `streaming` indefinitely; a new system log line surfaces the reset so users know to send a new message to resync. The window is configurable via the new `streamingWatchdogMs` context option (set to `0` to disable), and the handler now exposes a `dispose()` that clears the pending timer on shutdown. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

items.title: Sessions/Codex: skip redundant `delivery-mirror` transcript appends only 当 the latest assistant message has the same visible text, preventing duplicate visible replies 在 Codex-backed turns 不适用 suppressing repeated answers across turns. (#67185) Thanks @andyylin.
items.rawTitle: Sessions/Codex: skip redundant `delivery-mirror` transcript appends only when the latest assistant message has the same visible text, preventing duplicate visible replies on Codex-backed turns without suppressing repeated answers across turns. (#67185) Thanks @andyylin.

items.title: Auto-reply/prompt-cache: keep volatile inbound chat IDs out 的 the stable system prompt so task-scoped adapters can 复用 prompt caches across runs, while preserving conversation metadata 为了 the user turn 和 media-only messages. (#65071) Thanks @MonkeyLeeT.
items.rawTitle: Auto-reply/prompt-cache: keep volatile inbound chat IDs out of the stable system prompt so task-scoped adapters can reuse prompt caches across runs, while preserving conversation metadata for the user turn and media-only messages. (#65071) Thanks @MonkeyLeeT.

items.title: BlueBubbles/inbound: restore inbound image attachment downloads 在 Node 22+ 通过 stripping incompatible bundled-undici dispatchers 从 the non-SSRF fetch 路径, accept `已更新-message` webhooks carrying attachments, use event-type-aware dedup keys so attachment follow-ups are not rejected as duplicates, 和 重试 attachment fetch 从 the BB API 当 the initial Webhook arrives 使用 an empty array. (#64105, #61861, #65430, #67510) Thanks @omarshahine.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/inbound: restore inbound image attachment downloads on Node 22+ by stripping incompatible bundled-undici dispatchers from the non-SSRF fetch path, accept `updated-message` webhooks carrying attachments, use event-type-aware dedup keys so attachment follow-ups are not rejected as duplicates, and retry attachment fetch from the BB API when the initial webhook arrives with an empty array. (#64105, #61861, #65430, #67510) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: 内存/dreaming: strip AI-facing inbound metadata envelopes 从 session-corpus user turns 之前 normalization so REM topic extraction sees the user's actual message text, including array-shaped split envelopes. (#66548) Thanks @zqchris.
items.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: strip AI-facing inbound metadata envelopes from session-corpus user turns before normalization so REM topic extraction sees the user's actual message text, including array-shaped split envelopes. (#66548) Thanks @zqchris.

items.title: 飞书/Webhook: harden the Webhook transport 和 card-action replay guards to fail closed 在 missing `encryptKey` 和 blank callback tokens — refuse to start the Webhook transport 不适用 an `encryptKey`, reject unsigned requests 当 no 密钥 is present 而不是 accepting them, 和 drop blank card-action tokens 之前 the dedupe claim 和 dispatcher. Defense-在-depth over the already-closed monitor-account layer. (#66707) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Feishu/webhook: harden the webhook transport and card-action replay guards to fail closed on missing `encryptKey` and blank callback tokens — refuse to start the webhook transport without an `encryptKey`, reject unsigned requests when no key is present instead of accepting them, and drop blank card-action tokens before the dedupe claim and dispatcher. Defense-in-depth over the already-closed monitor-account layer. (#66707) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: Agent/fallback: 保留 the original prompt body 在 模型 fallback retries 使用 session history so the retrying 模型 keeps the active task 而不是 only seeing a generic continue message. (#66029) Thanks @WuKongAI-CMU.
items.rawTitle: Agents/fallback: preserve the original prompt body on model fallback retries with session history so the retrying model keeps the active task instead of only seeing a generic continue message. (#66029) Thanks @WuKongAI-CMU.

items.rawTitle: Reply/secrets: resolve active reply channel/account SecretRefs before reply-run message-action discovery so channel token SecretRefs (for example Discord) do not degrade into discovery-time unresolved-secret failures. (#66796) Thanks @joshavant.

Uses the existing `processMessage` 路径 和 is deduped 通过 #66816's inbound GUID cache. (#66857, #66721) Thanks @omarshahine.

changes.title: Slack/native commands: 修复 选项 menus 为了 slash commands such as `/verbose` 当 Slack renders native buttons 通过 giving each button a unique action ID while still routing them through the shared `openclaw_cmdarg*` listener. Thanks @Wangmerlyn.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/native commands: fix option menus for slash commands such as `/verbose` when Slack renders native buttons by giving each button a unique action ID while still routing them through the shared `openclaw_cmdarg*` listener. Thanks @Wangmerlyn.

changes.title: 飞书/Webhook: harden the Webhook transport 和 card-action replay guards to fail closed 在 missing `encryptKey` 和 blank callback tokens — refuse to start the Webhook transport 不适用 an `encryptKey`, reject unsigned requests 当 no 密钥 is present 而不是 accepting them, 和 drop blank card-action tokens 之前 the dedupe claim 和 dispatcher. Defense-在-depth over the already-closed monitor-account layer. (#66707) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/webhook: harden the webhook transport and card-action replay guards to fail closed on missing `encryptKey` and blank callback tokens — refuse to start the webhook transport without an `encryptKey`, reject unsigned requests when no key is present instead of accepting them, and drop blank card-action tokens before the dedupe claim and dispatcher. Defense-in-depth over the already-closed monitor-account layer. (#66707) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Agent/workspace files: route `Agent.files.get`, `Agent.files.set`, 和 workspace listing through the shared `fs-safe` helpers (`openFileWithinRoot`/`readFileWithinRoot`/`writeFileWithinRoot`), reject symlink aliases 为了 allowlisted Agent files, 和 have `fs-safe` 解决 opened-file real paths 从 the file descriptor 之前 falling back to 路径-based `realpath` so a symlink swap 之间 `open` 和 `realpath` can no longer redirect the validated 路径 off the intended inode. (#66636) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/workspace files: route `agents.files.get`, `agents.files.set`, and workspace listing through the shared `fs-safe` helpers (`openFileWithinRoot`/`readFileWithinRoot`/`writeFileWithinRoot`), reject symlink aliases for allowlisted agent files, and have `fs-safe` resolve opened-file real paths from the file descriptor before falling back to path-based `realpath` so a symlink swap between `open` and `realpath` can no longer redirect the validated path off the intended inode. (#66636) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 网关/MCP协议 loopback: switch the `/MCP协议` bearer comparison 从 plain `!==` to constant-time `safeEqualSecret` (matching the convention every other 认证 surface 在 the codebase uses), 和 reject non-loopback 浏览器-origin requests via `checkBrowserOrigin` 之前 the 认证 gate runs. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. (#66665) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/MCP loopback: switch the `/mcp` bearer comparison from plain `!==` to constant-time `safeEqualSecret` (matching the convention every other auth surface in the codebase uses), and reject non-loopback browser-origin requests via `checkBrowserOrigin` before the auth gate runs. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. (#66665) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Auto-reply/billing: classify pure billing cooldown fallback summaries 从 structured fallback reasons so users see billing guidance 而不是 the generic failure reply. (#66363) Thanks @Rohan5commit.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/billing: classify pure billing cooldown fallback summaries from structured fallback reasons so users see billing guidance instead of the generic failure reply. (#66363) Thanks @Rohan5commit.

changes.title: Agent/fallback: 保留 the original prompt body 在 模型 fallback retries 使用 session history so the retrying 模型 keeps the active task 而不是 only seeing a generic continue message. (#66029) Thanks @WuKongAI-CMU.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/fallback: preserve the original prompt body on model fallback retries with session history so the retrying model keeps the active task instead of only seeing a generic continue message. (#66029) Thanks @WuKongAI-CMU.

changes.title: Reply/secrets: 解决 active reply channel/account SecretRefs 之前 reply-run message-action discovery so channel 令牌 SecretRefs (为了 example Discord) do not degrade 进入 discovery-time unresolved-secret failures. (#66796) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Reply/secrets: resolve active reply channel/account SecretRefs before reply-run message-action discovery so channel token SecretRefs (for example Discord) do not degrade into discovery-time unresolved-secret failures. (#66796) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Agent/Anthropic: ignore non-positive Anthropic Messages 令牌 overrides 和 fail locally 当 no positive 令牌 budget remains, so invalid `max_tokens` values no longer reach the provider API. (#66664) thanks @jalehman
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Anthropic: ignore non-positive Anthropic Messages token overrides and fail locally when no positive token budget remains, so invalid `max_tokens` values no longer reach the provider API. (#66664) thanks @jalehman

changes.title: Agent/context engines: 保留 prompt-only 令牌 counts, not full request totals, 当 deferred maintenance reuses 之后-turn runtime context so background compaction bookkeeping matches the active prompt window. (#66820) thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/context engines: preserve prompt-only token counts, not full request totals, when deferred maintenance reuses after-turn runtime context so background compaction bookkeeping matches the active prompt window. (#66820) thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: BlueBubbles/inbound: 添加 a persistent file-backed GUID dedupe so MessagePoller Webhook replays 之后 BB Server restart 或 reconnect no longer cause the Agent to re-reply to already-handled messages. (#19176, #12053, #66816) Thanks @omarshahine.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/inbound: add a persistent file-backed GUID dedupe so MessagePoller webhook replays after BB Server restart or reconnect no longer cause the agent to re-reply to already-handled messages. (#19176, #12053, #66816) Thanks @omarshahine.

changes.title: Secrets/插件/status: align SecretRef inspect-vs-strict handling across 插件 preload, read-only status/Agent surfaces, 和 runtime 认证 paths so unresolved refs no longer 崩溃 read-only CLI flows while runtime-required non-env refs stay strict. (#66818) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Secrets/plugins/status: align SecretRef inspect-vs-strict handling across plugin preload, read-only status/agents surfaces, and runtime auth paths so unresolved refs no longer crash read-only CLI flows while runtime-required non-env refs stay strict. (#66818) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: 内存/dreaming: 停止 ordinary transcripts that merely quote the dream-diary prompt 从 being classified as internal dreaming runs 和 静默地 dropped 从 session recall ingestion. (#66852) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: stop ordinary transcripts that merely quote the dream-diary prompt from being classified as internal dreaming runs and silently dropped from session recall ingestion. (#66852) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Telegram/documents: sanitize binary reply context 和 ZIP-like archive extraction so `.epub` 和 `.mobi` uploads can no longer leak raw binary 进入 prompt context through reply metadata 或 archive-to-`text/plain` coercion. (#66877) Thanks @martinfrancois.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/documents: sanitize binary reply context and ZIP-like archive extraction so `.epub` and `.mobi` uploads can no longer leak raw binary into prompt context through reply metadata or archive-to-`text/plain` coercion. (#66877) Thanks @martinfrancois.

changes.title: Telegram/native commands: restore 插件-registry-backed auto defaults 为了 native commands 和 native skills so Telegram slash commands keep registering 当 `commands.native` 和 `commands.nativeSkills` stay 在 `auto`. (#66843) Thanks @kashevk0.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/native commands: restore plugin-registry-backed auto defaults for native commands and native skills so Telegram slash commands keep registering when `commands.native` and `commands.nativeSkills` stay on `auto`. (#66843) Thanks @kashevk0.

changes.title: OpenRouter/Qwen3: parse `reasoning_details` stream deltas as thinking content 不适用 skipping same-chunk 工具 calls, so Qwen3 replies no longer fail empty 在 OpenRouter 和 mixed reasoning/工具-call chunks still execute normally. (#66905) Thanks @bladin.
changes.rawTitle: OpenRouter/Qwen3: parse `reasoning_details` stream deltas as thinking content without skipping same-chunk tool calls, so Qwen3 replies no longer fail empty on OpenRouter and mixed reasoning/tool-call chunks still execute normally. (#66905) Thanks @bladin.

changes.title: 修复(bluebubbles): replay missed Webhook messages 之后 网关 restart via a persistent per-account cursor 和 `/API/v1/message/query?之后=<ts>` pass, so messages delivered while the 网关 was down no longer disappear. Uses the existing `processMessage` 路径 和 is deduped 通过 #66816's inbound GUID cache. (#66857, #66721) Thanks @omarshahine.
changes.rawTitle: fix(bluebubbles): replay missed webhook messages after gateway restart via a persistent per-account cursor and `/api/v1/message/query?after=<ts>` pass, so messages delivered while the gateway was down no longer disappear. Uses the existing `processMessage` path and is deduped by #66816's inbound GUID cache. (#66857, #66721) Thanks @omarshahine.

changes.title: Telegram/native commands: keep Telegram 命令-sync cache process-local so 网关 restarts re-register the menu 而不是 trusting stale 在-disk sync state 之后 Telegram cleared commands out-的-band. (#66730) Thanks @nightq.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/native commands: keep Telegram command-sync cache process-local so gateway restarts re-register the menu instead of trusting stale on-disk sync state after Telegram cleared commands out-of-band. (#66730) Thanks @nightq.

changes.title: Audio/self-hosted STT: restore `模型.providers.*.request.allowPrivateNetwork` 为了 audio transcription so private 或 LAN speech-to-text endpoints 停止 tripping SSRF blocks 之后 the v2026.4.14 regression. (#66692) Thanks @jhsmith409.
changes.rawTitle: Audio/self-hosted STT: restore `models.providers.*.request.allowPrivateNetwork` for audio transcription so private or LAN speech-to-text endpoints stop tripping SSRF blocks after the v2026.4.14 regression. (#66692) Thanks @jhsmith409.

changes.title: Auto-reply/media: 允许 workspace-rooted absolute media paths 在 auto-reply send flows so valid local media references no longer fail 路径 validation. (#66689)
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/media: allow workspace-rooted absolute media paths in auto-reply send flows so valid local media references no longer fail path validation. (#66689)

changes.title: WhatsApp/Baileys media upload: harden encrypted upload handling so large outbound media sends 避免 buffer spikes 和 reliability regressions. (#65966) Thanks @frankekn.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/Baileys media upload: harden encrypted upload handling so large outbound media sends avoid buffer spikes and reliability regressions. (#65966) Thanks @frankekn.

changes.title: QQBot/cron: guard against undefined `event.content` 在 `parseFaceTags` 和 `filterInternalMarkers` so cron-triggered Agent turns 使用 no content payload no longer 崩溃 使用 `TypeError: Cannot read properties 的 undefined (reading 'startsWith')`. (#66302) Thanks @xinmotlanthua.
changes.rawTitle: QQBot/cron: guard against undefined `event.content` in `parseFaceTags` and `filterInternalMarkers` so cron-triggered agent turns with no content payload no longer crash with `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'startsWith')`. (#66302) Thanks @xinmotlanthua.

changes.title: CLI/插件: 停止 `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` 插件 installs 从 falling back to hook-pack installs 之后 安全 scan failures, while still preserving non-安全 fallback behavior 为了 real hook packs. (#58909) Thanks @hxy91819.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: stop `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` plugin installs from falling back to hook-pack installs after security scan failures, while still preserving non-security fallback behavior for real hook packs. (#58909) Thanks @hxy91819.

changes.title: Claude CLI/sessions: classify `No conversation found 使用 session ID` as `session_expired` so expired CLI-backed conversations clear the stale binding 和 recover 在 the next turn. (#65028) thanks @Ivan-Fn.
changes.rawTitle: Claude CLI/sessions: classify `No conversation found with session ID` as `session_expired` so expired CLI-backed conversations clear the stale binding and recover on the next turn. (#65028) thanks @Ivan-Fn.

changes.title: Context Engine: gracefully fall back to the legacy engine 当 a third-party context engine 插件 fails at resolution time (unregistered id, factory throw, 或 contract violation), preventing a full 网关 outage 在 every channel. (#66930) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Context Engine: gracefully fall back to the legacy engine when a third-party context engine plugin fails at resolution time (unregistered id, factory throw, or contract violation), preventing a full gateway outage on every channel. (#66930) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: Control 界面/chat: keep optimistic user message cards visible 期间 active sends 通过 deferring same-session history reloads until the active run ends, including aborted 和 errored runs. (#66997) Thanks @scotthuang 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: keep optimistic user message cards visible during active sends by deferring same-session history reloads until the active run ends, including aborted and errored runs. (#66997) Thanks @scotthuang and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Media/Slack: 允许 host-local CSV 和 Markdown uploads only 当 the fallback buffer actually decodes as text, so real plain-text files work 不适用 letting opaque non-text blobs renamed to `.csv` 或 `.md` slip past the host-read guard. (#67047) Thanks @Unayung.
changes.rawTitle: Media/Slack: allow host-local CSV and Markdown uploads only when the fallback buffer actually decodes as text, so real plain-text files work without letting opaque non-text blobs renamed to `.csv` or `.md` slip past the host-read guard. (#67047) Thanks @Unayung.

changes.title: Ollama/onboarding: split setup 进入 `Cloud + Local`, `Cloud only`, 和 `Local only`, 支持 direct `OLLAMA_API_KEY` cloud setup 不适用 a local daemon, 和 keep Ollama web search 在 the local-host 路径. (#67005) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Ollama/onboarding: split setup into `Cloud + Local`, `Cloud only`, and `Local only`, support direct `OLLAMA_API_KEY` cloud setup without a local daemon, and keep Ollama web search on the local-host path. (#67005) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Docker/build: verify `@matrix-org/matrix-sdk-crypto-nodejs` native bindings 使用 `find` under `node_modules` 而不是 a hardcoded `.pnpm/...` 路径 so pnpm v10+ virtual-store layouts no longer fail the image build. (#67143) Thanks @ly85206559.
changes.rawTitle: Docker/build: verify `@matrix-org/matrix-sdk-crypto-nodejs` native bindings with `find` under `node_modules` instead of a hardcoded `.pnpm/...` path so pnpm v10+ virtual-store layouts no longer fail the image build. (#67143) Thanks @ly85206559.

changes.title: Matrix/E2EE: keep startup bootstrap conservative 为了 passwordless 令牌-认证 bots, still attempt the guarded repair pass 不适用 requiring `channels.matrix.password`, 和 document the remaining password-UIA limitation. (#66228) Thanks @SARAMALI15792.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/E2EE: keep startup bootstrap conservative for passwordless token-auth bots, still attempt the guarded repair pass without requiring `channels.matrix.password`, and document the remaining password-UIA limitation. (#66228) Thanks @SARAMALI15792.

changes.title: Cron/announce delivery: suppress mixed-content isolated cron announce replies that end 使用 `NO_REPLY` so trailing silent sentinels no longer leak summary text to the target channel. (#65004) Thanks @neo1027144-creator.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/announce delivery: suppress mixed-content isolated cron announce replies that end with `NO_REPLY` so trailing silent sentinels no longer leak summary text to the target channel. (#65004) Thanks @neo1027144-creator.

changes.title: 插件/bundled channels: partition bundled channel lazy caches 通过 active bundled root so `OPENCLAW_BUNDLED_PLUGINS_DIR` flips 停止 reusing stale 插件, setup, secrets, 和 runtime state. (#67200) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/bundled channels: partition bundled channel lazy caches by active bundled root so `OPENCLAW_BUNDLED_PLUGINS_DIR` flips stop reusing stale plugin, setup, secrets, and runtime state. (#67200) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Packaging/插件: prune common test/spec cargo 从 bundled 插件 runtime dependencies 和 fail npm release validation if packaged test cargo reappears, keeping published tarballs leaner 不适用 插件-specific special cases. (#67275) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Packaging/plugins: prune common test/spec cargo from bundled plugin runtime dependencies and fail npm release validation if packaged test cargo reappears, keeping published tarballs leaner without plugin-specific special cases. (#67275) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Agent/context + 内存: trim default startup/skills prompt budgets, cap `memory_get` excerpts 通过 default 使用 explicit continuation metadata, 和 keep QMD reads aligned 使用 the same bounded excerpt contract so long sessions pull less context 通过 default 不适用 losing deterministic follow-up reads.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/context + Memory: trim default startup/skills prompt budgets, cap `memory_get` excerpts by default with explicit continuation metadata, and keep QMD reads aligned with the same bounded excerpt contract so long sessions pull less context by default without losing deterministic follow-up reads.

changes.title: Matrix/commands: skip DM pairing-store reads 在 room traffic 现在 that room control-命令 authorization ignores pairing-store entries, keeping the room 路径 narrower 不适用 changing room 认证 behavior. (#67325) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/commands: skip DM pairing-store reads on room traffic now that room control-command authorization ignores pairing-store entries, keeping the room path narrower without changing room auth behavior. (#67325) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Matrix/安全: block DM pairing-store entries 从 authorizing room control commands. (#67294) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/security: block DM pairing-store entries from authorizing room control commands. (#67294) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: 网关/安全: enforce `localRoots` containment 在 the webchat audio embedding 路径. (#67298) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/security: enforce `localRoots` containment on the webchat audio embedding path. (#67298) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.rawTitle: Webchat/security: reject remote-host `file://` URLs in the media embedding path. (#67293) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Dreaming/内存-core: use the ingestion day, not the source file day, 为了 daily recall dedupe so repeat sweeps 的 the same daily note can increment `dailyCount` across days 而不是 stalling at `1`. (#67091) Thanks @Bartok9.
changes.rawTitle: Dreaming/memory-core: use the ingestion day, not the source file day, for daily recall dedupe so repeat sweeps of the same daily note can increment `dailyCount` across days instead of stalling at `1`. (#67091) Thanks @Bartok9.

items.title: Control 界面/Overview: 添加 a 模型 认证 status card showing OAuth认证 令牌 health 和 provider rate-limit pressure at a glance, 使用 attention callouts 当 OAuth认证 tokens are expiring 或 expired. Backed 通过 a new `模型.authStatus` 网关 method that strips credentials 和 caches 为了 60s. (#66211) Thanks @omarshahine.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/Overview: add a Model Auth status card showing OAuth token health and provider rate-limit pressure at a glance, with attention callouts when OAuth tokens are expiring or expired. Backed by a new `models.authStatus` gateway method that strips credentials and caches for 60s. (#66211) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: Agent/compaction: cap the compaction reserve-令牌 floor to the 模型 context window so small-context local 模型 (e.g. Ollama 使用 16K tokens) no longer trigger context-overflow errors 或 infinite compaction loops 在 every prompt. (#65671) Thanks @openperf.

items.title: Agent/OpenAI Responses: classify the exact `Unknown 错误 (no 错误 details 在 response)` transport failure as failover reason `unknown` so assistant/模型 fallback still runs 为了 that no-details failure 路径. (#65254) Thanks @OpenCodeEngineer.
items.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI Responses: classify the exact `Unknown error (no error details in response)` transport failure as failover reason `unknown` so assistant/model fallback still runs for that no-details failure path. (#65254) Thanks @OpenCodeEngineer.

items.rawTitle: Models/probe: surface invalid-model probe failures as `format` instead of `unknown` in `models list --probe`, and lock the invalid-model fallback path in with regression coverage. (#50028) Thanks @xiwuqi.

items.rawTitle: Agents/failover: classify OpenAI-compatible `finish_reason: network_error` stream failures as timeout so model fallback retries continue instead of stopping with an unknown failover reason. (#61784) thanks @lawrence3699.

items.title: 内存/LanceDB: 添加 cloud storage 支持 to `内存-lancedb` so durable 内存 indexes can run 在 remote object storage 而不是 local disk only. (#63502) Thanks @rugvedS07.
items.rawTitle: Memory/LanceDB: add cloud storage support to `memory-lancedb` so durable memory indexes can run on remote object storage instead of local disk only. (#63502) Thanks @rugvedS07.

items.title: 内存-core/QMD `memory_get`: reject reads 的 arbitrary workspace markdown paths 和 only 允许 canonical 内存 files (`内存.md`, `内存.md`, `DREAMS.md`, `dreams.md`, `内存/**`) plus exact paths 的 active indexed QMD workspace documents, so the QMD 内存 backend can no longer be used as a generic workspace-file read shim that bypasses `read` 工具-policy denials. (#66026) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Memory-core/QMD `memory_get`: reject reads of arbitrary workspace markdown paths and only allow canonical memory files (`MEMORY.md`, `memory.md`, `DREAMS.md`, `dreams.md`, `memory/**`) plus exact paths of active indexed QMD workspace documents, so the QMD memory backend can no longer be used as a generic workspace-file read shim that bypasses `read` tool-policy denials. (#66026) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`.
